# RoutingDecision

> Records a model routing decision and associated savings

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| routingRuleId | string | yes | - | Rule that was applied |
| promptCategory | string | yes | - | Prompt category |
| requestedModel | string | yes | - | Model originally requested |
| selectedModel | string | yes | - | Model actually used |
| wasRerouted | boolean | yes | - | Whether the model was changed |
| savingsUsd | float | yes | 0 | Cost savings from rerouting |
| qualityDelta | float | yes | - | Quality difference (selected - requested) |
| latencyDelta | integer | yes | - | Latency difference in ms |
| llmCallId | string | yes | - | Associated LLM call ID |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |
